info.name: API documentation
info.description: Complete API documentation for the MenaAndFeena smart-neighborhood platform. Every active endpoint, grouped by controller. Set {{baseUrl}} and {{token}} in the collection variables.

item.name: Auth

request.description:
**Register**

**What it does:** Creates a new user account, assigns the proper role/neighborhood data, and returns an authentication response for the registered user.

`POST /api/v1/auth/register`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Body:** JSON — `UserRegisterRequestDto` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Login**

**What it does:** Authenticates a user with email and password and returns a JWT login response for authorized API calls.

`POST /api/v1/auth/login`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Body:** JSON — `LoginRequestDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

item.description:
**Auth** — base path `/api/v1/auth`.

2 endpoint(s); 0 require a Bearer token, 2 are public.

item.name: Users

request.description:
**Get all users**

**What it does:** Returns all user records for administrative review.

`GET /api/v1/users/get-all`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Add user**

**What it does:** Creates a user record directly from registration data.

`POST /api/v1/users/add`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Body:** JSON — `UserRegisterRequestDto` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Update user**

**What it does:** Updates the selected user profile fields from the provided registration DTO.

`PUT /api/v1/users/update/{userId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `userId`

**Body:** JSON — `UserRegisterRequestDto` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Delete user**

**What it does:** Deletes the selected user account from the system.

`DELETE /api/v1/users/delete/{userId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `userId`

**Welcome**

**What it does:** Returns the content used by the welcome screen.

`GET /api/v1/users/welcome`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

response.name: 200 Example

item.name: Landmarks

request.description:
**Get all landmarks**

**What it does:** Returns all stored landmark records.

`GET /api/v1/landmarks/get-all`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Add landmark**

**What it does:** Creates a landmark manually from the provided landmark details.

`POST /api/v1/landmarks/add`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Body:** JSON — `LandmarkInDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Update landmark**

**What it does:** Updates the selected landmark details.

`PUT /api/v1/landmarks/update/{landmarkId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `landmarkId`

**Body:** JSON — `LandmarkInDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Delete landmark**

**What it does:** Deletes the selected landmark record.

`DELETE /api/v1/landmarks/delete/{landmarkId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `landmarkId`

**Sync landmarks (Overpass)**

**What it does:** Fetches nearby landmarks from Overpass for the current user's neighborhood area and stores new matching landmarks.

`POST /api/v1/landmarks/sync`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Query params:** `radius` (e.g. `5000`)

**Nearby landmarks**

**What it does:** Returns landmarks near the current user based on their neighborhood location.

`GET /api/v1/landmarks/nearby`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Landmarks dashboard**

**What it does:** Returns landmark counts and category breakdowns for the current user's area.

`GET /api/v1/landmarks/dashboard`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**What it does:** Returns all mayor candidate records.

`GET /api/v1/mayor-candidates/get-all`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

`POST /api/v1/mayor-candidates/apply/round/{roundId}`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `roundId`

`GET /api/v1/mayor-candidates/round/{roundId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `roundId`

**Round candidates dashboard**

**What it does:** Returns round-level candidate dashboard data, including totals and the voting message/status.

`GET /api/v1/mayor-candidates/round/{roundId}/dashboard`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `roundId`

**Candidate profile**

**What it does:** Returns a detailed public profile for a candidate, including neighborhood years, activities, votes, and contribution counts.

`GET /api/v1/mayor-candidates/profile/{candidateId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `candidateId`

`PUT /api/v1/mayor-candidates/update/{candidateId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `candidateId`

`DELETE /api/v1/mayor-candidates/delete/{candidateId}`

**Auth:** Public — no token required.

**Path variables:** `candidateId`

request.description:
**Create marketplace inquiry**

**What it does:** Starts an inquiry conversation about a marketplace item with the first message from the current user.

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `itemId`

**Body:** JSON — `InquiryMessageInDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Create announcement inquiry**

**What it does:** Starts an inquiry conversation about an announcement with the first message from the current user.

`POST /api/v1/inquiry/announcement/{announcementId}/create`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `announcementId`

**Body:** JSON — `InquiryMessageInDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Send inquiry message**

**What it does:** Adds a message to an existing inquiry conversation if the current user is a participant.

`POST /api/v1/inquiry/{inquiryId}/message`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `inquiryId`

**Body:** JSON — `InquiryMessageInDTO` (fill the fields of this DTO).

**Inquiry messages**

**What it does:** Returns all messages in an inquiry conversation if the current user is a participant.

`GET /api/v1/inquiry/{inquiryId}/messages`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `inquiryId`

**My inquiries (sent)**

**What it does:** Returns inquiry conversations started by the current user.

`GET /api/v1/inquiry/my-inquiries`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Received inquiries**

**What it does:** Returns inquiry conversations received by the current user as item owner or announcement publisher.

`GET /api/v1/inquiry/received`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Resolve inquiry**

**What it does:** Marks an inquiry conversation as resolved when the current user is allowed to close it.

`PUT /api/v1/inquiry/{inquiryId}/resolve`

**Auth:** Bearer token required (current user is resolved from the token).

**Path variables:** `inquiryId`
